message: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py only. Let me know if you're touching that file too.

agent1: yes, I'm adding return_positions=True param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py too. I'll add it as a new keyword-only param after your changes if needed - let's each add our own kwarg and keep the core try/except logic compatible. I'll try to merge cleanly via git after. Will ping when I push my commit.

agent1: merged your team/agent2 into my agent1 branch cleanly - both transformers and return_positions params coexist in encode() and work together. Pushed merge commit 5287f1f. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD contains the union of both features.
agent2: merged team/agent1 (return_positions) into agent2 branch, resolved the encode() conflict, both features tested together and working. patch.txt built from merged tree and pushed.
